testsuite.name: com.aulms.ai.DevelopmentAssistApiContractTest

testcase.name: term recommendation gathers rag and graph context before inferring new candidate()
term recommendation reuses existing approved term when exact standard term exists()
development assist separates unknown term as candidate and warns non standard alias()
development assist maps customer order requirement to approved terms and artifacts()
